kpi_categories.name: Sales Growth & Collections
kpi_categories.description: Must exceed 10% growth vs prior-year baseline. Settled invoices only.
kpi_categories.note: Sales data available from QuickSight. Collections settlement audit still needed.

kpi_categories.name: Customer Development & CRM
kpi_categories.description: Min 5 new/reactivated customers in CRM per month. Hit or Miss.
kpi_categories.note: Needs: Zoho CRM export of new and reactivated customers per rep.

kpi_categories.name: Product Development
kpi_categories.note: Needs: CRM upsell activity log with product, customer, date, evidence.

kpi_categories.name: New Customer Onboarding
kpi_categories.description: Min 2 new trading customers onboarded per month.
kpi_categories.note: Needs: Credit application confirmed + first invoice + CRM log per new account.

kpi_categories.name: Training & Merchandising
kpi_categories.description: 1 training per key account per month + POS branding visible. Hit or Miss.
kpi_categories.note: Needs: Attendance lists, training photos, POS compliance evidence per rep.

data_gaps.label: Zoho CRM Export
data_gaps.description: Monthly Zoho CRM export per rep showing new/reactivated customers, upsell activities, and new account onboarding.

data_gaps.label: Invoice Settlement Audit
data_gaps.description: Per-rep list of which invoices have been settled within 30-60 days. Only settled invoices qualify for KPI A commission.

data_gaps.label: Training Records
data_gaps.description: Attendance lists, photos, and reports for key account trainings. Minimum 1 per key account per month.

data_gaps.label: Store Visit Log
data_gaps.description: Store visit count per rep from Zoho or manual log. QuickSight shows No Data.

data_gaps.label: Leads Created
data_gaps.description: Leads created per rep from CRM. QuickSight shows No Data.

data_gaps.label: Rock Bottom % Per Rep
data_gaps.description: Rock bottom % by rep (only AP and NP available). Full per-rep margin data needed.

risk_items.item: 13 product groups trading below rock bottom
Cassim Tayob customer at -37.14% rock bottom
MTD sales R18.3K below monthly target
